item.title: Florida youths standing up for their rights.
item.description:
Florida senate is about to pass HB 1557 “Don’t Say Gay” legislation that will knock LGBTQ progress back 100 years. I’m devastated that Gov DeSatan would allow this bullsh*t, but I couldn’t be more proud of all the students who walked out in solidarity of their friends and classmates to protest this ridiculous legislation. #FreeToSayGay #LGBTQ #FuckDeSantis MOST VIRAL UPDATE: as @NerdNerdburger points out, the spitfire that started this walk out, has been suspended from school, indefinitely. I hope he uses that suspension to rally even more youth to stand up for LGBTQ kids and to get that colossal ass-hat DeSantis out of office!!! Here’s the link to the article @NerdNerdburger mentions. https://www.news4jax.com/news/florida/2022/03/04/student-organizer-of-dont-say-gay-school-walk-outs-suspended/
Representative Michele Rayner
Representative Carlos Guillermo Smith pt1
Rep CGS pt 2
item.dc:creator: muzzeylicious

item.title: One of my favourite TV personalities Jamie Hyneman gives a message to Russian soldiers.
item.dc:creator: prisonmike1991

item.title: Just needed to vent
item.description: I witnessed a man hit a brick-encased mailbox at close to 100 mph. I knew he was dead the moment I stepped up to him but did CPR for close to 5 minutes until paramedics arrived. His eyes were open as I worked, almost looking at me. I don’t know what I’m feeling. Maybe it’s delayed shock. Time stood still as I knelt in the broken glass and plastic shards as I did what I’ve been trained to do but it was surreal. Sorry to ramble. I just thought it might help me to put it into words. Please don’t speed. Drive safely. -Josh
item.dc:creator: TheRussMartinShow

item.title: Really? How unlucky can I be?
item.description:
#chemo #chemotherapy
#babyboss #chemotherapy First time posting, been a lurker so many years. Tonight is hard, just felt like sharing. Stage 4 pancreatic cancer, palliative chemotherapy and alot goin on in my head… Just realised I won’t be here in 6 months. It’s hard tonight… Just a bit of love would be appreciated… nothing else… leaving behind my 4 year old babygirl is hard to deal with… always saw you guys comment like madmen/madwomen on shitposts… please prove me wrong and send love. ***Update*** An hour in and you guys delivered… made me cry like a baby. Bucket list is done and i’m workin on it. Wanna see an Opera, want to go eat at this really fancy restaurant in Montreal called Toqué, going to a VR place with friends, play in a big poker tournament, bring the little onw to the amusement park La ronde etc… got a bunch more stuff and workin on it, planning all these expenses ain’t easy at all but ill make it work! Sincerely you guys are amazing, didn’t expect so many comments and reading each and everyone of them makes me happy… thank you guys… ***Second Update*** For those who are curious, I got 2 bucket lists, a bullshit one which is : 1)Wsop poker tournament live 2)Cooking classes with the one and only Gordon 3) Tickets to tomorrowland 4) F18 jet ride 5) Private party with Martin Garrix 6) See the Taj Mahal, Pyramids or Maya temples 7) A trip to Scotland or Japan 8) Ocean fishing 9) see the Canadiens win another stanley cup 10) A carnivore plant. And then there’s the reasonnable bucket list that i’m workin on 1) Finish my half sleeve tatoo 2) VR with friends 3) Plan a golfing trip 4) Take 5 days off alone by myself 5) Take yoga classes 6) See an opera 7) Fancy restaurant in montreal called Toqué 8) MDMA 9) Go fishing locally 10) Go see the blue jays in TO 11) Learn to ski 12) Go karting in Mont Tremblant 13) That my five best friends write me a love letter. There you have it ! ***Before going to bed Update***The love you guys… I can’t stop crying… no jokes… so much love… I knew I had to do this… for those who asked, yes there’s a gofundme page to help, but in all honesty this is NOT the reason I created this post. I do not expect anything from it. https://gofund.me/a7382ac8 Also I do not have a mutation gene or they cannot find an alternative treatment as of now but more tests are being conducted as we speak… I know this seems stupid but there is other clinical treatments available, but far from home and very costly for me to do so…
item.dc:creator: nohva

item.title: Zelensky denies the rumors that he went abroad and recorded a video from his office located in Bankova'ya street: "I'm in Kyiv, I work at my place of work. Nobody escaped from anywhere"
item.description: Earth orbits around Zelensky’s nutsack! Save this man, help this man, help these people, save these people, protect these people!!!!!!!!! !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!#standwithukraine #fuckputin #volodymyr_zelensky

item.title: Day 280: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: The Chophouse Brisket & Bacon Patty, Roasted Cremini And Oyster Mushrooms, Blue Cheese, Crispy Onions, Horseradish Aioli, On A Brioche Bun From Walker’s Tap & Table In Glenwood, MD Previous Day 279: https://imgur.com/gallery/HZM4kiT MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

item.title: 32, 2 strokes in 9 months
item.description: What is even happening, I have heart surgery scheduled this month...first time I lost speech and right side function, now it's impaired sight and left side function. I'm too young and I'm so, so tired of relearning walking...just a rant of a post.
